characters.physical_details: Pink hair, green eyes, small and fit; old black horned headband kept in her childhood room; scar on left palm.

key_relationships.bond_forger: family dog whose visions she can read

characters.occupation_status: WISE field operative under Westalian cultural-attache cover; lives alone.
characters.literacy_languages: Fluent and literate in Westalian and Ostanian; trained for professional work in both.

state_transitions.change: Files a false WISE assessment at 08:14 that downgrades Damian and creates an exploitable blind spot.
Hears a fragment about an asset inside WISE but cannot isolate the speaker before the signal breaks.
Takes a baton hit that badly bruises her ribs; kisses Damian in the safe house and makes the alliance personal.
Hears Damian's recognition lock in at Becky's gala but does not yet know he will keep working with that knowledge.
Tells Damian she is a telepath and learns he has known her identity since the gala.
WISE review reinstates her field status and keeps her cover identity intact.

characters.physical_details: Dark hair, taller than Anya, controlled posture; split eyebrow scar after chapter_09.

key_relationships.donovan_desmond: father and source of political pressure

characters.occupation_status: Foreign Affairs diplomat secretly running a counter-operation against the Renewal Front through Desmond channels.
characters.literacy_languages: Fluent and literate in Ostanian and Westalian.

state_transitions.change: Forms a limited intelligence alliance with Anya.
Survives the ambush, takes the eyebrow scar, and kisses Anya in the safe house.
Identifies the cultural attache as Anya Forger at Becky's gala.
Loses his cache to the SSS raid; Reinhardt is exposed and his network is badly burned.
Publicly accuses Werner Voss and connected procurement channels at the summit, making himself politically exposed.
Learns Anya is a telepath.

characters.availability: chapter_02 to chapter_17; POV in chapters 7, 13, and 15.

characters.physical_details: Older Desmond patriarch; mostly offstage but still authoritative enough that both sons call him directly.

key_relationships.damian_desmond: father exerting strategic and emotional pressure

characters.occupation_status: Retired political patriarch whose name and legacy still control access inside the party and defense network.
characters.literacy_languages: Fluent and literate in Ostanian and Westalian.

state_transitions.change: Re-enters on-page continuity as a living authority when Damian and Demetrius refer to him directly and Damian takes his call.

characters.availability: Offstage; alive and active in chapter_07.

characters.physical_details: Blond hair graying at the temples, reading glasses, still fit but past younger field peak.

key_relationships.anya_forger: adoptive daughter, trainee, and operational concern
key_relationships.gerald_falk: trusted WISE colleague who turns out to be the mole

characters.occupation_status: Semi-retired WISE operative and Anya's handler; keeps a university consulting cover and returns to field work for the summit.
characters.literacy_languages: Fluent in Westalian and Ostanian; additional tradecraft languages implied by career history.

state_transitions.change: Returns to active operational planning for the summit.
Finds Falk in the Communications Room and learns Anya's false report created the blind channels Falk exploited.
Lets Damian into a family dinner orbit after Anya's reinstatement.

characters.physical_details: Long black hair, strikingly youthful for her age; faint hand scars from years of blade work.
characters.occupation_status: City hall clerk publicly; Garden assassin until chapter_14, then acting independently for her family.
characters.literacy_languages: Fluent and literate in Ostanian; functional Westalian through family and public life.

state_transitions.change: Kills Karl Dominic, photographs manifests plus Garden cleanup records, and withholds the standard completion confirmation.
Shows the Dominic evidence to Loid and Anya and refuses any further Garden assignments.
Kills the south-terrace attack team at the summit in full view of Yuri.

characters.availability: Present in chapters 6, 10, 14, 15, and 17; POV in chapter_10.

characters.physical_details: Dark curly hair; polished socialite presentation.
characters.literacy_languages: Fluent and literate in Ostanian; socially fluent in Westalian settings.

state_transitions.change: Hosts the gala and tells Anya she is her best friend and the only one who sees the private version of her.

characters.physical_details: Short grey-blonde hair; reading glasses on a chain.
characters.literacy_languages: Fluent and literate in Westalian and Ostanian; multilingual by career necessity.

state_transitions.change: Accepts Anya's false Damian assessment into the system.
Signals that another agency has flagged the same sector and Anya's assessment does not match.
Reinstates Anya after the review.

characters.physical_details: Dark hair, intense expression, SSS-trained build.

key_relationships.anya_forger: niece by marriage who draws suspicion
key_relationships.yor_forger: older sister whom he ultimately protects

characters.occupation_status: Senior SSS officer focused on domestic intelligence and security events.
characters.literacy_languages: Fluent and literate in Ostanian; working Westalian for security duties.

state_transitions.change: Starts logging Anya's repeated government-event appearances as suspicious.
Witnesses Yor on the summit terrace and protects her by reporting an unknown Westalian security asset instead.

characters.physical_details: Large elderly white dog; slow except during visions.

key_relationships.anya_forger: she reads his thoughts and visions

characters.occupation_status: Forger family dog and former experiment with precognitive episodes.
characters.literacy_languages: Animal cognition only; thinks in images and immediate sensations.

state_transitions.change: Has a sharp precognitive vision of violence at a government building.
Pins the summit's south-perimeter threat point on Loid's map.

characters.physical_details: Ordinary office-worker face, thinning hair, glasses.

key_relationships.anya_forger: senior colleague who spots and exploits her false report

characters.occupation_status: Senior WISE analyst and twenty-year Renewal Front mole.
characters.literacy_languages: Fluent and literate in Westalian and Ostanian.

state_transitions.change: Appears as an ordinary analyst with cynical thoughts about WISE threat framing.
Exposed in the Communications Room and taken into custody.

characters.physical_details: Heavyset, military carriage, long-set border-war anger.
characters.occupation_status: National Unity Party power broker tied to defense procurement and the Renewal Front.
characters.literacy_languages: Fluent and literate in Ostanian; military-style Westalian familiarity implied by career.

state_transitions.change: Is publicly accused at the summit and loses deniable distance from the Renewal Front.

characters.availability: Referenced from chapter_07; present in chapter_15.

characters.physical_details: Severe, precise, and closest to Donovan in bearing.

key_relationships.damian_desmond: older brother managing the family line
key_relationships.donovan_desmond: father and inherited model of power

characters.occupation_status: Manager of the living Desmond family's political and defense-connected network.
characters.literacy_languages: Fluent and literate in Ostanian and Westalian.

state_transitions.change: Presses Damian to attend the harder security rooms and stay legible to the family machine.
Becomes harder to separate from the exposed defense-profiteering network around the Desmond name.

timeline.story_start: Early autumn, unspecified post-Strix year, in Berlint as Westalian-Ostanian tensions rise again.
timeline.estimated_span: From early autumn through the November summit sequence, then a jump to late March; about six months total.

seasonal_track.season: Autumn, explicitly October by the Blackbell gala.
Late autumn; chapter_13 opens on the first morning of November and chapters 14-16 follow right after.
Late March with early-spring light and lingering cold.

key_events.event: Anya gets courier Kinglet out of a tailed dead drop.
At the state dinner, Anya identifies Damian as anti-Renewal.
Anya files the false report and Damian is shifted toward passive monitoring.
Anya and Damian formalize a limited alliance.
The Bretz operation surfaces Hartig, Krueger-Schiff, and a 400,000-dinar authorization.
Bond's vision and Sylvia's discrepancy call widen the crisis.
Damian is ambushed; Anya gets him to a WISE safe house and the alliance turns romantic.
Yor kills Karl Dominic and finds Voss-linked manifests plus Garden cleanup records.
At Becky's gala Damian identifies the cultural attache as Anya Forger and the Kreuzfeld courier goes missing.
Crane is killed at Kreuzfeld, Damian's cache is raided, and Reinhardt is exposed.
Yor breaks with Garden, brings Dominic evidence home, and the family plans around Bond's summit warning.
At the summit, the terrace attack is stopped, Voss is accused, Falk is caught, and Yuri sees Yor.
Anya tells Damian about telepathy; Damian says he has known her identity since the gala.
By late March Anya is back in the field and Damian comes to dinner.

geography.primary_setting: Berlint, Ostania, between the Westalian mission, the Ostanian ministries, and the summit venue.

key_locations.name: Westalian Diplomatic Quarter / WISE Station
key_locations.details: Anya's cover workplace and the concealed WISE hub.

key_locations.name: Ostanian Government District / Foreign Affairs Ministry
key_locations.details: Damian's workplace and the site of the state dinner, forum, and political meetings.

key_locations.name: Berlint Central Market
key_locations.details: Dense market between the diplomatic quarter and the government district; chapter_01 extraction site.

key_locations.name: Cafe Linden
key_locations.details: Debrief point between the diplomatic quarter and the south-central residential neighborhoods.

key_locations.name: Anya's apartment
key_locations.details: Her separate adult residence; one room plus kitchenette.

key_locations.name: Forger Apartment
key_locations.details: Loid, Yor, and Bond's home; Anya's childhood room is still here.

key_locations.name: Damian's apartment
key_locations.details: East-side apartment where he keeps the Eden class photo and childhood box.

key_locations.name: Berlint Gesellschaft Club
key_locations.details: Exclusive private club where Anya and Damian pose as a couple during the Bretz operation.

key_locations.name: Blackbell Estate
key_locations.details: Site of Becky's gala and Damian's recognition of Anya.

key_locations.name: Dominic Compound
key_locations.details: Northern-outskirts weapons estate where Yor kills Karl Dominic and finds the records.

key_locations.name: WISE Safe House
key_locations.details: Bare west-district fallback apartment used after the chapter_09 ambush.

key_locations.name: International Conference Center
key_locations.details: Summit venue; use outline/spatial_layout.json for the interior layout and route logic.

distances: Berlint Central Market sits between the diplomatic quarter and the government district.
Cafe Linden lies between the diplomatic quarter and the south-central residential neighborhoods.
The Dominic Compound is about forty minutes north of Berlint proper.
The International Conference Center sits apart from the ministry district; routes live in outline/spatial_layout.json.

world_rules: Anya reads surface thoughts within roughly twenty meters and cannot switch it off; crowds hit like radios.
Strong emotions and active memories broadcast louder than routine thought; sustained reading causes headaches and fatigue.
Surface thoughts are not objective truth: fear, shame, and illness can mimic guilt or concealment.
Anya can read animal minds; Bond's precognitive episodes arrive as fragmentary near-future images and sensations.
Westalis and Ostania exist in a late-Cold-War structure with a militarized border and profiteers on both sides.
WISE works under diplomatic cover; SSS handles Ostanian domestic intelligence and event security.
The Garden is a covert assassination organization; chapter_10 evidence shows it was used for Renewal Front supply-chain cleanup.
Technology is late-20th-century analog/early-digital: landlines, early mobile phones, paper files, dead drops, and secure relays.

power_structure.mechanism: Operational authority, mission assignment, and review-board control.
Handler authority, technical expertise, and paternal influence.

power_structure.over: The Desmond family machine, loyal aides, and inherited party access
power_structure.mechanism: Patriarchal authority, donor relationships, and the still-operative weight of his name.

power_structure.over: Renewal Front activity and allied procurement channels
power_structure.mechanism: Political influence, defense-linked money, and hardline credibility.

power_structure.over: The usable Desmond machine around Damian
power_structure.mechanism: Control of family legitimacy, party access, and defense-network expectations.
Compartmented tasking, secrecy, and a decades-long obedience structure.

power_structure.over: Renewal Front access to WISE reporting lanes until his arrest
power_structure.mechanism: Senior analyst authority over watch coverage and routing decisions.

objects.name: Anya's childhood headband
objects.origin: Eden-era black horned headband kept in her childhood room.
objects.status: Still at the Forger apartment and occasionally worn when she sleeps there.

objects.name: Anya's false WISE assessment
objects.origin: The chapter_03 report filed at 08:14 under FORGER, ANYA that downgraded Damian to low priority monitoring.
objects.status: Creates the blind spot Falk exploits; later exposed and reviewed inside WISE.

objects.name: Krueger-Schiff secondary authorization
objects.origin: Lead pulled from Colonel Bretz's thoughts and the debrief.
objects.status: Ties Hartig to a 400,000-dinar freight push through secondary authorization and strategic national interest cover.

objects.name: Maintenance Continuity Annex
objects.origin: Defense Liaison paperwork shown to Damian by Grosz.
objects.status: Shows duplicate 31,400-dinar line items for the same northern depot, including one routed through Klee Civic Advisory.

objects.name: Gerald Falk's fountain pen
objects.origin: Graduation gift from Falk at Eden Academy.
objects.status: Still in Anya's desk after Falk is exposed.

objects.name: Eden Academy class photo
objects.origin: Childhood class photo from Eden kept in Damian's unopened box.
objects.status: Used to confirm Anya's identity after the gala and again in chapter_16.

objects.name: Karl Dominic's shipping manifests
objects.origin: Photographed from Dominic's desk after his assassination.
objects.status: Links Voss and defense procurement to the weapons pipeline; used in family planning and summit exposure.

objects.name: Garden subcontracting records
objects.origin: Photographed Dominic paperwork showing Garden-coded cleanup assignments.
objects.status: Shows nine cleanup jobs across four years with fifteenth-of-the-month releases, proving the Garden serviced the Renewal Front supply chain.

objects.name: Loid's kitchen whiteboard
objects.origin: Ordinary household planning board turned into the chapter_14 summit map.
objects.status: Used for the family summit plan; Bond identifies the south-perimeter threat on it.

income_sources.source: Anya's WISE salary routed through her diplomatic cover
income_sources.amount: Enough for a small independent apartment
income_sources.reliability: Stable as long as her cover and field status hold

income_sources.source: Loid's WISE support plus university consulting cover income
Yor's city hall salary; Garden payments before chapter_14
income_sources.amount: Ordinary salary plus former covert supplements
income_sources.reliability: Garden portion ends when Yor breaks with the organization

income_sources.source: Damian's ministry salary plus access to Desmond family money
income_sources.reliability: Stable but entangled with scandal fallout

knowledge_state.knows: She is a telepath who cannot switch the ability off.
Damian is secretly working against the Renewal Front.
Her chapter_03 Damian assessment was false and opened a blind spot.
She heard a fragment about an asset inside WISE and a handoff before review closed.
Anya is an intelligence operative under diplomatic cover.
The cultural attache is Anya Forger from Eden Academy.
Anya is a telepath and has been hearing him since the state dinner.
The Garden serviced the Renewal Front weapons pipeline and the coded release dates match her own payment pattern.
Anya's false report created the blind channels Falk exploited.
hidden_from: outside family and WISE review channels

knowledge_state.knows: Anya's Damian assessment was false and damaged WISE analysis.
Anya's repeated appearances in restricted government rooms form a pattern worth logging.
Yor killed the summit attack team and he protected her by reporting an unknown Westalian security asset instead.
Anya's false report created exploitable blind channels inside WISE.

environmental_constants: Berlint runs from damp autumn into slush-rimmed winter and late-March brightness; trams, cold stone, and radiator noise recur.
The Forger apartment is warm and cluttered: Bond fur, Yor's cooking, and Loid's order.
WISE spaces are fluorescent and coffee-stained; government venues are polished, over-secured, and overheated.
Crowds arrive to Anya as layered radio-like noise.
